title: MaxEnchant
description: Adds /maxenchant command to apply the best enchantments to your held item.
body:
Adds /maxenchant command, granting the best enchants on your weapon (according to minecraft.fandom.com). 
Requires [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) to work.
Customizable in [Mod Menu's](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) config.

# FAQ:
Does the command work without OP permissions?
No, it doesn't.

Can you run the command in survival mode?
Yes, but only with OP.

Does it work in multiplayer?
Yes, but only if the mod is installed on the server.

Is it compatible with other mods?
Pretty sure yes.
